# bytepluscc_tls_alarm_content_template_type (Data Source)

Data Source schema for Byteplus::TLS::AlarmContentTemplateType



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

### Read-Only

- `alarm_content_template_id` (String) Alert notification template ID
- `alarm_content_template_name` (String) Name of the alert notification content template
- `create_time` (String) Creation time of the alert notification content template
- `ding_talk` (Attributes) DingTalk notification content template (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ding_talk))
- `email` (Attributes) Email notification content template (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--email))
- `is_default` (Boolean) Is default template
- `lark` (Attributes) Feishu notification content template (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--lark))
- `modify_time` (String) Last modified time of the alert notification content template
- `need_valid_content` (Boolean) Whether to validate the content template
- `sms` (Attributes) SMS notification content template (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sms))
- `vms` (Attributes) Voice notification content template (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--vms))
- `we_chat` (Attributes) WeCom notification content template (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--we_chat))
- `webhook` (Attributes) Custom Webhook alert notification content template (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--webhook))

<a id="nestedatt--ding_talk"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ding_talk`

Read-Only:

- `content` (String) Alert notification content. Supports plain text format, content variables, and content functions. Note: The maximum length of the notification content after variable rendering is 8 KB. Content exceeding this limit will be truncated. If the body is left blank, the default content will be used.
- `locale` (String) The language for fixed content in alert notifications. Available values: zh-CN, en-US.
- `title` (String) Alert notification subject


<a id="nestedatt--email"></a>
### Nested Schema for `email`

Read-Only:

- `content` (String) Alert notification content. Supports plain text format, content variables, and content functions. Note: The maximum length of the notification content after variable rendering is 8 KB. Content exceeding this limit will be truncated. If the body is left blank, the default content will be used.
- `locale` (String) The language for fixed content in alert notifications. Available values: zh-CN, en-US.
- `subject` (String) Email notification subject

- `locale` (String) The language for fixed content in alert notifications. Available values: zh-CN, en-US.
- `title` (String) Alert notification subject

- `locale` (String) The language for fixed content in alert notifications. Available values: zh-CN, en-US.


<a id="nestedatt--we_chat"></a>
### Nested Schema for `we_chat`

Read-Only:

- `content` (String) Alert notification content. Supports plain text format, content variables, and content functions. Note: The maximum length of the notification content after variable rendering is 8 KB. Content exceeding this limit will be truncated. If the body is left blank, the default content will be used.
- `locale` (String) The language for fixed content in alert notifications. Available values: zh-CN, en-US.
- `title` (String) Alert notification subject


<a id="nestedatt--webhook"></a>
### Nested Schema for `webhook`

Read-Only:

- `content` (String) Alert notification content, usually in JSON format. Supports content variables and content functions. Note: The maximum length of the notification content after variable rendering is 8 KB. Content exceeding this limit will be truncated. If the body is left blank, the default content will be used.
